paper.title: HST astrometry in the 30 Doradus region: II. Runaway stars from new proper motions in the Large Magellanic Cloud

extraction.summary: No Galactic HVS/unbound candidates. Paper presents proper motions for 368,787 stars in the 30 Doradus region of the LMC. Identified runaway stars are LMC-internal objects. All stars are bound to the LMC, not the Milky Way. No claims of Milky Way unbound status or hypervelocity classification.

method_chain.summary: HST/WFC3+ACS two-epoch proper motions for 368,787 stars in 30 Dor (LMC). Epoch difference ~3 yr reaching ~0.1 mas/yr precision.
outputs: Relative proper motions (mu_X, mu_Y) for 368,787 stars

source_refs.context: Abstract: 368,787 stars, 2-epoch HST survey, ~0.1 mas/yr precision

method_chain.summary: Identified stars with proper motions exceeding 3-sigma error threshold. Found 17 potential LMC runaway stars.

source_refs.context: Abstract: stars exceeding 3-sigma error threshold, 17 potential LMC runaways

candidate_groups_considered.description: 7 candidate OB proper-motion runaway stars from VFTS survey (Table 1). LMC-internal runaway candidates, not Galactic HVS.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: These are LMC-internal runaways from the 30 Dor region. Not Galactic HVS/unbound candidates.

source_refs.context: Table 1: Candidate OB proper-motion runaway stars (7 VFTS stars)

candidate_groups_considered.description: 11 candidate young A-F proper-motion runaway stars from the general catalog (Table 2, tab:afrun). LMC-internal.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: These are young A-F runaway stars in the LMC. Not Galactic HVS/unbound candidates.

source_refs.context: Table 2: Candidate young A-F proper-motion runaways (11 stars)

candidate_groups_considered.description: 10 likely-escaped stars from R136 cluster (Table 3), tangential velocities correlated with magnitude.
candidate_groups_considered.reason: Stars escaped from R136 cluster within the LMC. Not Galactic HVS/unbound candidates.

source_refs.context: Table 3: Likely-escaped stars from R136 (10 stars)
